mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM v_latest_rank_snapshot r JOIN novel n ON r.novel_id = n.id
r.ranking_type = #{rankingType} AND r.site_id = (SELECT id FROM site WHERE code = #{siteCode})
AND COALESCE(r.category, n.category) = #{category}
AND (n.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR n.author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(crawl_time, '%m-%d %H:%i') AS `time`, `rank` AS `rank`, view_count AS viewCount, rec_count AS recCount FROM ranking_record WHERE novel_id = #{novelId} AND ranking_type = #{rankingType} AND crawl_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(3), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) ORDER BY crawl_time ASC

SELECT n.id AS novelId, n.title AS title, s.code AS siteCode, s.color AS color, DATE_FORMAT(r.crawl_time, '%m-%d %H:%i') AS `time`,
r.`rank` r.view_count r.rec_count r.view_count
AS `value` FROM ranking_record r JOIN novel n ON r.novel_id = n.id JOIN site s ON r.site_id = s.id WHERE n.id IN
#{id}
AND r.crawl_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(3), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) ORDER BY r.crawl_time ASC
